nodes.name: Napothera
nodes.summary: Napothera（Napothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如纹胸鹪鹛、Sumatran wren-babbler、White-throated wren-babbler等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sumatran wren-babbler
nodes.summary: Sumatran wren-babbler（Napothera albostriata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sumatran wren-babbler。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sumatran wren-babbler
nodes.summary: The Sumatran wren-babbler (Napothera albostriata) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to western Sumatra. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70–291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The Sumatran wren-babbler (Napothera albostriata) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to western Sumatra.

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
